sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, txt String);
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'hello world'), (2, 'clickhouse database');
UPDATE test_strings SET txt = initcap(txt) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, initcap(txt) FROM test_strings WHERE id IN (1, 2);
SELECT initcap('join us at the competition on friday!') AS formatted_text;
